titleStmt.title: SII 22.58: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 58. (A.R. No. 58 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM. BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJ. RĀJĀDHIRĀJADĒVA II—14th YEAR (A.D. 1176-77)

summary.p: This inscription begins with the introduction Kaḍalśūḻnda Pārmādarum etc. The king is given the attribute “who was pleased to take Madurai and Īḻam”. This registers a gift of land about six vēli in extent in the village Śembiyaṉkuḷappākkam and 4090 saplings of areca-palm to be grown therein, after purchasing them from the sabhā of Maṇaṟkuḍi alias Uttamaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvindaḷūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu, as tirunāmattukkāṇi to goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-Nāchchiyār in the temple of Tirumayāṉam-Uḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr by Arumoḻi-Āḻviyār (daughter of ?) Uṟṟanōytīrppāṉ of Iḷaṅgārikuḍi in Pērāvūr-nāḍu, a division of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, who was the wife of Vēdavaṉamuḍaiyāṉ Ammaiyappar alias Pallavarāyar of Paḻaiyaṉūr in Mēnmalai-Paḻaiyaṉūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ kaṭal cūḻnta pārmātarum pūmātaruṅ kalaimā
taru maṭal cūḻnta pormātaruñ cirmātaru mamaintu vāḻa
nāṟkaṭal cūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭal pol pukaḻ parappi yātiyukamā
meṉṉa cotimuṭi puṉaintaruḷi yaṟucamaiyamu maimpūtamun neṟiyi
lniṉṟu pārkkat teṉṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷaru mutalāya maṉṉa varkaḷ
tiṟai cumantu vantiṇṭic cevippa yūḻiyūḻivaru ceṅko leḻupāru mi
ṉitaḷippac cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭai mukkok
kiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṟmarāṉa
tribhuvana[ ccakravattikaḷ] maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīrājā
dhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu patiṉālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭaco
ḻavaḷanāṭṭu vākkūr nāṭṭut tirukkaṭavūruṭaiyār tirumayāṉamuṭai
ya perumāḷukkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattu meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭai
yāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ammaiyapparāṉa pallavarāyaṟku
ppukka Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭup perāvūr nāṭṭu Iḷaṅ
kārikuṭi Iḷaṅkārikkuṭaiyāṉ Uṟṟanoy tirppāṉ Arumoḻi
āḻviyār rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvintaḷūr nāṭṭu maṇaṟkuṭi
yāṉa Uttamacoḻac catuvvetimaṅkalattu
sabhaiyār pakkal sabhai ril brā
hmaṇaṉ Ātrayaṉ cattitevaṉum Ammayaṉ mut
ta cāttaṉ pāṇṭaṉum Ātrayaṉ cāttaṉ cakkarapā
ṇiyum Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkalum ke
mār paṭṭaṉperil vilaikoṇṭu tara
ḷppaṭa kāṇṭāṉ kamukampātti nālāyirattu
toṇṇūṟu Ikkamukampātti nālāyirattutoṇ
ṇūṟum Ikkoyilil tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭai
ya nācciyāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ivar kuḷa
ppākkattu vicaiya nalluḻāṉ Aḻakiyacoḻa
muventaveḷāṉum nālūr mātevapaṭṭaṉu
m pakkal Innāṭṭu māṟpaṭukaiyil piṟinta ti
runiṟṟuccoḻamaṅkalattu veṟu Iṟukkiṟa cem
piyaṉ kuḷappākkattuk kollai nilattum tarami
linilattum Ikkoṭṭattuk kantakumārapaṭṭa
ṉperil vilaikoṇṭu taraviṭṭa pramāṇappaṭikku kā
ṇiyāṉa kollaiyum taramili nilam A
ñcemukkāle muṉṟumāmukkāṇi
yum Ippaṭi cantrādityavaṟ tirunāmattukā
ṇiyāka viṭṭapaṭikku ḥ .
Digital edition of SII 22.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
